evidence.claim: There is a queue of waiting patients.
evidence.fact: The system ensures the waiting queue always reflects current patient conditions.
evidence.user_story_span: There is a queue of waiting patients.

evidence.claim: The system removes that patient from the queue.
evidence.fact: The system removes the patient from the queue when taken by a physician.
evidence.user_story_span: And removes that patient from the queue
evidence.fact_span: The system removes the patient from the queue

evidence.claim: The system displays the patient at the head of the queue.
evidence.fact: The system lets a physician take the patient at the head of the queue.
evidence.user_story_span: the patient at the head of the queue
evidence.fact_span: the patient at the head of the queue
